title: Mmmarcantel
compiled_truth: Mmmarcantel is an external contact at [Equiva](companies/equiva). Over the corpus period (2000-02-09 to 2002-01-31), Mmmarcantel sent 14 and received 588 emails, totalling 602 interactions. Top correspondents: [Matthew Lenhart](people/matthew-lenhart) (10), [Eric Bass](people/eric-bass) (3), [Kevin A Boone](people/kevin-a-boone-accenture) (1).
